hero.sub: Award-winning KEENON service robots deployed across Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, New Mexico & Arkansas. Turnkey setup in 1–3 days.
t10.desc: 40kg payload capacity with a 23.8" advertising screen. Built for high-volume restaurant and banquet hall environments.
t9.desc: Multi-floor hotel delivery with RFID elevator unlock, multilingual display, and 30kg capacity. Ideal for hospitality.
s100.desc: Autonomous UV disinfection for healthcare, office, and commercial spaces. IP54 rated, GPS tracking, autonomous return-to-dock.
proof.q1: "The T10 paid for itself in the first month. Our servers can now focus on the customer experience instead of running food back and forth."
proof.q1.name: Marco R.
proof.q1.title: Restaurant Owner, Dallas TX
proof.q2: "Setup took less than a day. The T9 navigates our hotel floors flawlessly and guests absolutely love interacting with it."

footer.desc: Authorized KEENON Robotics partner. Serving Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, New Mexico & Arkansas.
about.hero.sub: We believe the future of labor is not replacement — it is augmentation. Robots that work with your team, not instead of them.
about.coverage.sub: Texas-based, Southwest-focused. On-site support within 24 hours.
about.cta.sub: Be among the first in your city to deploy autonomous service robots. Setup takes 1–3 days. The first week is on us.
products.hero.sub: Three purpose-built robots. One deployment partner. Turnkey setup across Texas and the Southwest in 1–3 business days.
products.h2.cta:
NOT SURE WHICH ROBOT?
WE'LL HELP YOU CHOOSE.
products.cta.sub: Our team will assess your space and recommend the right fit. Setup takes 1–3 days and the first 6 days are free.
solutions.hero.sub: One robot fleet. Five industries. The same technology that powers global hotel chains and Michelin-starred restaurants — now available to you, with local Texas support.
solutions.cta.sub: Tell us about your space and we'll recommend the right solution. Free consultation, 6-day trial, local Texas support.
blog.hero.sub: Industry analysis, deployment guides, and ROI breakdowns for Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, and Southwest USA businesses navigating the labor shortage with autonomous robots.
